title: Dagger (Assassin-class)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1|title2=''Assassin''-class}}
{{Otheruses|Dagger}}
'''''Dagger''''' was a group of two [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

They were attacked by type 2 mines deployed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a Light Calamari Cruiser]] ''[[Planka]]''. However, two [[Missile Boat]]s arrived and destroyed the mines, allowing a transport to dock and repair the two corvettes. The incident was recorded for future simulation missions for pilots, namely [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
